CONTENT.Club career: Born in France to Chadian parents,N'Doram is a youth exponent from Monaco. He made his league debut on 20 August 2016 in a 1–0 away win over Nantes. He played the full game. N'Doram scored his first goal on 2 February 2017 in a Coupe de France round of 32 match against Chambly.In November 2019, N'Doram was injured in a car crash which also involved team-mate Manuel Cabit, who was seriously hurt.On 4 June 2020, N’Doram completed a permanent transfer to Metz for a fee of €4 million. He signed a four-year contract.
CONTENT.Personal life: N'Doram's father Japhet N'Doram is a Chadian former footballer.
CONTENT.External links: Kévin N'Doram at the French Football Federation (in French)Kévin N'Doram at the French Football Federation (archived) (in French)

SUMMARY: Kévin N'Doram (born 22 January 1996) is a French professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder and centre-back.
